title: Modeling Cycles, Units, Error, and Uncertainty · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Evaluate demand and capacity for a public program using incomplete measurements. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a validated demand-capacity model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder needs into answerable model questions, quantities, constraints, and validation criteria.
Track units, scales, significant digits, and uncertainty through multi-stage calculations.
Estimate how measurement and rounding error affect a computed result.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

stimulus.title: Model Validation case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: math intermediate modeling uncertainty. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A model is valid when its training examples fit.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate a model against held-out cases, limits, units, and stakeholder behavior. Artifact under review: a validated demand-capacity model.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Model Validation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Model Validation applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Validate a model against held-out cases, limits, units, and stakeholder behavior.
